Cultural Event: Music Night
Date: 8 April 2026
Time: 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM
Venue: Open Stage
Maximum Performers: 20 Entries
Registration Deadline: 5 April 2026
About the Event:

Music Night is an evening filled with melodies and performances. Students can participate in solo singing, duet, band performances, or instrumental music. The event aims to celebrate musical talent and create an entertaining atmosphere.
Event Rules:

• Performance time limit: 5 minutes.
• Participants must bring their own instruments if required.
• Song lyrics must be appropriate.
• Judges’ decision will be final.
